meta.title: Reality Distortion Filter - Delulu Score
meta.description: 10 everyday situations reveal your reality distortion level. Realistic vs delulu interpretation — which lens do you see through?

app.title: Reality Distortion Filter
app.subtitle: How distorted is your lens on reality?
app.disclaimer: This test is for fun only and is not a professional psychological assessment.

s1.situation: The barista drew a heart on your coffee cup.
s1.reality: They're practicing latte art. They probably do this for every customer.
s1.delulu: They're into me. I should go back tomorrow and get their number.

s2.situation: Your crush viewed your Instagram story first.
s2.reality: They happened to be on their phone. It's just algorithm ordering.
s2.delulu: They're constantly checking my profile. This is basically a confession.

s3.reality: Standard interview courtesy. They probably say that to every candidate.
s3.delulu: I basically got the job. Should've asked when I can start.

s4.situation: Your friend didn't laugh at your joke.
s4.reality: It just wasn't that funny. I'll try a better one next time.
s4.delulu: My humor is too advanced for them. No one at this level understands my genius yet.

s5.situation: You sent a message and got left on read for 3 hours.
s5.reality: They're probably busy. People have their own lives going on.
s5.delulu: They're crafting the perfect response. My message was just that powerful.

s6.situation: A stranger on the street looked at you twice.
s6.reality: I probably have something on my face. Or they were just spacing out.
s6.delulu: They were mesmerized by my aura. I must be radiating today.

s7.situation: You guessed the right answer on a test.
s7.reality: 25% probability worked out. Just got lucky.
s7.delulu: The universe is on my side. I'm naturally gifted at exams.

s8.situation: You gave a presentation and the audience was silent.
s8.reality: It was boring or they missed the timing to react.
s8.delulu: They were speechless from the impact. My presentation was that powerful.

s9.situation: Your favorite song suddenly played on the radio.
s9.reality: It's a popular song, so it plays often. Just a coincidence.
s9.delulu: The universe is sending me a sign. Today is going to be special.

s10.situation: Your ex liked your social media post.
s10.reality: They were scrolling mindlessly and tapped by habit. Means nothing.
s10.delulu: They're not over me. This is the beginning of our reunion arc.

crystal.name: Crystal Lens
crystal.tagline: Seeing the world as it is. Clear and transparent.
crystal.analysis: You read reality with precision. No rose-tinted glasses, no distortion filters. You judge situations objectively and act on facts, not feelings. The essence of realism!

tinted.name: Tinted Glass
tinted.tagline: Just a light tint on reality.
tinted.analysis: Mostly realistic, but you let your imagination wander sometimes. A healthy positive filter that makes life a little more fun. Master of balance!

rose.name: Rose Filter
rose.tagline: Classic rose-colored glasses. The world looks a bit prettier.
rose.analysis: Half reality, half fantasy! If there's a positive interpretation, you'll take it. This level of distortion can actually be a source of confidence. Right on the border where delulu becomes the solulu!

prism.name: Prism Vision
prism.tagline: Ability to refract reality into rainbows.
prism.analysis: Your interpretation skills are at art level. You turn ordinary moments into dramatic narratives. With such a rich imagination, you're always living the most entertaining version of reality!

kaleidoscope.name: Kaleidoscope Mode
kaleidoscope.analysis: Your reality distortion field is legendary. Every coincidence is a cosmic sign, every smile is a confession, every failure is a plot twist right before success. In your world, you're always the main character. Iconic!

share.text: My Reality Distortion: {score}% — I'm "{tier}"! 🔮 What's your lens?
